uplink.description: GNSSPosition (type 0x3): on-device float32 BE lon/lat fix + UTC epoch; gps success, wearing
uplink._note: Synthetic in-bounds fix (lat 39.9042, lon 116.4074 encoded as IEEE-754 float32 BE). Expected re-derived against the CORRECTED codec, which forks from upstream in two ways: (1) upstream hex2float divides the mantissa by 0x7fffff instead of 0x800000, inflating non-zero-mantissa coordinates (e.g. 116.0 -> 116.0000062); we use /0x800000. (2) upstream builds the timestamp as new Date((unixSeconds + 8*3600)*1000), shifting the fix 8h forward; we emit true UTC. epoch 1781827200 -> 2026-06-22T00:00:00Z (upstream would emit 08:00:00Z).

uplink.description: Heartbeat (type 0x2): battery %, link quality, BLE/GPS state, charge/wear timers, movement level 1 -> motion detected
Beacon (type 0x7): cloud-solved BLE positioning + asset scans surfaced as extras, never a position.* fix
Register (type 0x1): device configuration, not a measurement -> error
